basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) JRF Notification 2026 has been released on 23 June 2026 on the official website iitr.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Tech. with GATE qualified (Polymer/ Chemical/ Mechanical/ Biotechnology/ Materials Science/ Rubber Technology/ Nano Technology/ Environmental Science), or M.Sc. (Chemistry/ Polymer Chemistry/ Industrial Chemistry/ Materials Chemistry or allied field) (Must have GATE or NET qualified)
qualification.details: M. Tech. with GATE qualified (Polymer/ Chemical/ Mechanical/ Biotechnology/ Materials Science/ Rubber Technology/ Nano Technology/ Environmental Science), or M.Sc. (Chemistry/ Polymer Chemistry/ Industrial Chemistry/ Materials Chemistry or allied field) (Must have GATE or NET qualified)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee JRF Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Roorkee JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: M. Tech. with GATE qualified (Polymer/ Chemical/ Mechanical/ Biotechnology/ Materials Science/ Rubber Technology/ Nano Technology/ Environmental Science), or M.Sc. (Chemistry/ Polymer Chemistry/ Industrial Chemistry/ Materials Chemistry or allied field) (Must have GATE or NET qualified)

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the IIT Roorkee JRF recruitment is 15 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M. Tech. degree with GATE qualification in relevant fields or an M.Sc. degree with GATE or NET qualification in Chemistry, Polymer Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Materials Chemistry, or allied fields.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JRF post will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee).

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: IIT Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand. The specific city mentioned for this recruitment is Saharanpur.
